text:
Created attachment 239231
v1

Moin moin

This tries to reduce the number of llvm versions in the ports tree to at least the ones >= 10.

The patch is attached, and can also be found here:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-Cleanup-Remove-devel-llvm-789-0.patch

mfg Tobias
